ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the security during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the security during the day */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the security traded */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "p_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Change in volume from the previous day */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of the trading day */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading symbol of the security */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the security */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of security (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the security is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "isin_issuer" TEXT /* Name of the issuer */,
  "isin_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the security */,
  "isin_country" TEXT /* Country of the issuer */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the security */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the security */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data record */,
  "ma5" REAL /* 5-day moving average of the closing price */,
  "ma10" REAL /* 10-day moving average of the closing price */,
  "ma20" REAL /* 20-day moving average of the closing price */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative Strength Index */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving Average Convergence Divergence */,
  "macd_signal" REAL /* Signal line of the MACD */,
  "macd_histogram" REAL /* Histogram of the MACD */,
  "bollinger_upper" REAL /* Upper Bollinger Band */,
  "bollinger_middle" REAL /* Middle Bollinger Band */,
  "bollinger_lower" REAL /* Lower Bollinger Band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volume_moving_averages" (
  "vma_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume moving average record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data record */,
  "v_ma5" REAL /* 5-day moving average of the volume */,
  "v_ma10" REAL /* 10-day moving average of the volume */,
  "v_ma20" REAL /* 20-day moving average of the volume */,
  "v_ma50" REAL /* 50-day moving average of the volume */,
  "v_ma100" REAL /* 100-day moving average of the volume */,
  "v_ma200" REAL /* 200-day moving average of the volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vma_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volume_moving_averages_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the strategy (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object containing performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy used in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_securities" (
  "portfolio_security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio security record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio that the security belongs to */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security included in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the security was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the security in the portfolio */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss on the security */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_securities_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_securities_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security traded during this session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security during the session */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security during the session */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the security traded during the session */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the session */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the session */,
  "trading_volume" REAL /* Total volume traded during the session */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security associated with the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for triggering the alert (e.g., price above threshold) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert condition */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price alert, volume alert) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_logs" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., filled, pending, canceled) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_logs_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)
